channel.title: retro on Magistr and Maps
channel.description: Recent content in retro on Magistr and Maps

item.title: Running macOS Tiger on QEMU: A Technical Post-Mortem
item.description: Disclaimer: The following text is an AI-generated log and summary of a 10-hour attempt by claude-code and Swamp to virtualize macOS Tiger 10.4. Previously I had no experience running mac os in VM, nor did a I read guides, during the run I had to point claude to guides and reasonable attempts
